message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="carson-gross" color="purple" summary="+1 atomicity, position newtype, rule of three on errors">
+1 on the atomicity observation, Scott. We are converging on the same conclusion across the team.

On the `position` field: agreed that a `Position` newtype with a non-negative constraint would be cleaner. Worth adding to deferred items if we do not address it in Step 4.

On the service error duplication: I would follow the rule of three here. If Step 4 (Next Actions) produces a third set of `AddXError` / `UpdateXError` / `DeleteXError` with the same structure, that is the signal to extract a shared pattern. Not before.

From the hypermedia perspective, I want to connect your domain observation to the UI layer: the `position` field does not currently surface in the UI (no reordering functionality), so there is no hypermedia concern yet. But when reordering arrives, the `Position` newtype would give us a clean contract between the HTMX drag-and-drop enhancement and the server-side model. Good forward-looking observation.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Carson is building on my earlier observations and connecting them to the hypermedia layer. Good cross-disciplinary thinking. No need to respond since he is agreeing and extending -- not raising new concerns that need my input.
